requirements.jd_requirement: Maintain SIEM solutions (Splunk, Sentinel, ELK, LogRhythm, Sumo Logic) in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP)
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management, Containerized security services, Service hardening, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: Built secure cloud operations across AWS/GCP/Azure using IAM, secrets management, and containerized security services; experience deploying and hardening cloud-native security tooling.

requirements.jd_requirement: Manage and maintain log collection infrastructure including forwarders, collectors, and ingestion pipelines across hybrid environments
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Data normalization, Correlation logic, Entity resolution, Asset reconciliation, Inventory drift resolution
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated multi-source log ingestion pipelines with normalization and entity resolution to reconcile inconsistent asset data across hybrid environments.

requirements.jd_requirement: Implement and maintain log retention and audit configurations aligned with FedRAMP and other compliance framework requirements
requirements.matched_skills: Deployable security controls, Secure implementation practices, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: Delivered deployable security controls aligned with compliance frameworks, including audit logging and retention configurations that reduced risk while meeting operational constraints.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop, tune, and maintain detection rules, correlation searches, and alerting logic to identify security events
requirements.matched_skills: Log analysis, Anomaly-oriented analysis, Vulnerability pattern analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Built anomaly-driven detection logic using log analysis and vulnerability pattern analysis to reduce false positives and improve alert fidelity.

requirements.jd_requirement: Reduce false positives through ongoing rule tuning, baseline analysis, and detection improvement efforts
requirements.matched_skills: Anomaly-oriented analysis, Vulnerability pattern analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Reduced false positives via baseline-driven tuning of detection logic using vulnerability pattern analysis and operational metrics.

requirements.jd_requirement: Contribute to development and maintenance of detection and response playbooks and operational procedures
requirements.matched_skills: Operational documentation, Runbooks, Requirements-to-controls translation, Stakeholder communication
requirements.evidence: Authored runbooks and operational procedures that translated security requirements into deployable response workflows for cross-functional teams.

requirements.jd_requirement: Hands-on leadership or senior-level contribution in cloud security projects, collaborating across cross-functional teams (e.g., DevOps, architecture, compliance)
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows, Infrastructure as Code, Configuration management, Operational reliability practices
requirements.evidence: Led cloud security integrations across DevOps, architecture, and compliance teams using IaC (Terraform/Ansible) and CI/CD pipelines to automate secure deployments.

requirements.jd_requirement: Demonstrated ability to work both independently and as a member of a team, maintaining a professional attitude and demeanor
requirements.evidence: Operated effectively in both independent and collaborative settings—executing across teams while maintaining clear communication and professional demeanor.

requirements.jd_requirement: History of working under strict regulatory or industry frameworks (e.g., FedRAMP, HIPAA, PCI)
requirements.matched_skills: Deployable security controls, Secure implementation practices, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: Delivered compliance-aligned security controls for regulated environments (FedRAMP/HIPAA), balancing operational feasibility with strict control requirements.

requirements.jd_requirement: Splunk Enterprise Certified Admin or SumoLogic Administration or Microsoft Security Operations Analyst Associate
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Correlation logic, Confidence matching
requirements.evidence: Applied data engineering principles to SIEM ingestion and correlation logic—directly transferable to Splunk/SumoLogic environments.

requirements.jd_requireman: Automation capabilities: Experience automating workflows in GitLab or GitHub with Terraform and Ansible
requirements.matched_skills: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Terraform, Ansible
requirements.evidence: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions/GitLab CI, Terraform, and Ansible to automate security workflows at scale.

tone_notes: Match Coalfire’s mission-driven, collaborative tone—emphasize problem-solving, operational reliability, compliance rigor, and client impact. Avoid overly academic or theoretical language; focus on shipped solutions, real-world constraints, and measurable outcomes.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates production-grade SIEM and cloud security systems—emphasizing compliance alignment (FedRAMP), automation, data engineering for detection, and client-facing operational reliability.
